---
title: "Publication Figures"
author: "Ashita Jawali"
date: "2026-05-20"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

options(repos = c(CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org"))

# CRAN packages
install.packages(c(
  "tidyverse",
  "pheatmap",
  "ggplot2",
  "RColorBrewer",
  "survival",
  "survminer",
  "ggpubr",
  "reshape2",
  "corrplot",
  "viridis"
))

# Bioconductor
if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install(c(
  "ComplexHeatmap",
  "DESeq2",
  "edgeR",
  "limma",
  "GSVA",
  "immunedeconv",
  "PCAtools",
  "EnhancedVolcano"
))
```

## PCA Plots

```{r cars}
library(PCAtools)
library(tidyverse)

# Load expression matrix
expr <- read.csv(
  "C:/Users/ashit/Desktop/Research Paper/Tcellex/normalized_16_samples.csv",
  row.names = 1,
  check.names = FALSE
)

# IMPORTANT:
# PCAtools expects:
# rows = genes
# columns = samples

# Create metadata
metadata <- data.frame(
  Sample = colnames(expr),
  Group = c(rep("LUAD", 8), rep("LUSC", 8))
)

rownames(metadata) <- metadata$Sample

# Check matching
all(colnames(expr) == rownames(metadata))

# Run PCA
p <- pca(
  expr,
  metadata = metadata,
  removeVar = 0.1
)

# Plot
pca_plot <- biplot(
  p,
  colby = "Group",
  shape = "Group",
  legendPosition = "right",
  pointSize = 5,
  lab = colnames(expr)
) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 18)

ggsave(
  "PCA_plot_publication.png",
  plot = pca_plot,
  width = 12,
  height = 10,
  dpi = 600
)
```

## Sample-Level Boxplots

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)

# Melt matrix
df <- melt(as.matrix(combined))

colnames(df) <- c(
  "Gene",
  "Sample",
  "Expression"
)

# Correct group assignment
sample_groups <- c(
  rep("LUAD", ncol(luad_common)),
  rep("LUSC", ncol(lusc_common))
)

names(sample_groups) <- colnames(combined)

df$Group <- sample_groups[df$Sample]

# Plot
ggplot(df,
       aes(
         x = Group,
         y = Expression,
         fill = Group
       )) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.2) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14)
```


## Correlation Heatmap

```{r pressure1, echo=FALSE}
library(pheatmap)

expr <- read.csv("C:/Users/ashit/Desktop/Research Paper/Tcellex/normalized_16_samples.csv", row.names = 1)

cor_matrix <- cor(expr)

pheatmap(
  cor_matrix,
  clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
  clustering_distance_cols = "euclidean",
  color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100)
)
```


## T-cell Marker Heatmap

```{r pressure2, echo=FALSE}
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)

markers <- read.csv("C:/Users/ashit/Desktop/Research Paper/Tcellex/tcell_marker_comparison_16.csv", row.names = 1)

mat <- as.matrix(markers)

mat_scaled <- t(scale(t(mat)))

Heatmap(
  mat_scaled,
  name = "Expression",
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_columns = TRUE,
  col = colorRamp2(c(-2,0,2), c("navy","white","firebrick"))
)
```

## GSVA Immune Scoring

```{r pressure3, echo=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(GSVA)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(pheatmap)
library(ggplot2)

# =========================
# 1. LOAD DATA
# =========================
expr <- read.csv(
  "C:/Users/ashit/Desktop/Research Paper/Tcellex/normalized_16_samples.csv",
  row.names = 1,
  check.names = FALSE
)

# =========================
# 2. REMOVE QC ROWS
# =========================
expr <- expr[!rownames(expr) %in% c(
  "N_unmapped",
  "N_multimapping",
  "N_noFeature",
  "N_ambiguous"
), ]

# =========================
# 3. ENSG CLEANUP
# =========================
gene_ids <- gsub("\\..*", "", rownames(expr))

# =========================
# 4. MAP ENSG -> SYMBOL
# =========================
symbols <- mapIds(
  org.Hs.eg.db,
  keys = gene_ids,
  column = "SYMBOL",
  keytype = "ENSEMBL",
  multiVals = "first"
)

expr$SYMBOL <- symbols

# remove unmapped genes
expr <- expr[!is.na(expr$SYMBOL), ]

# =========================
# 5. COLLAPSE DUPLICATES
# =========================
expr <- expr %>%
  group_by(SYMBOL) %>%
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), mean))

expr <- as.data.frame(expr)
rownames(expr) <- expr$SYMBOL
expr$SYMBOL <- NULL

# =========================
# 6. FINAL MATRIX
# =========================
expr_matrix <- as.matrix(expr)

# =========================
# 7. CHECK SIGNATURE MATCH
# =========================
signature <- c("CD3D","CD3E","CD8A","CD8B","GZMB")

print(signature %in% rownames(expr_matrix))

# =========================
# 8. GSVA (ssGSEA)
# =========================
gene_set <- list(Tcell = signature)

param <- ssgseaParam(
  exprData = expr_matrix,
  geneSets = gene_set
)

gsva_scores <- gsva(param)

print(gsva_scores)


# =========================
# 10. BARPLOT
# =========================
scores_df <- data.frame(
  Sample = colnames(gsva_scores),
  Score = as.numeric(gsva_scores[1, ])
)

ggplot(scores_df, aes(x = Sample, y = Score)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(title = "T-cell Infiltration Score (ssGSEA)",
       x = "Sample",
       y = "Score")
```

## Immune Cell Deconvolution

```{r pressure4, echo=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(immunedeconv)

expr <- read.csv(
  "C:/Users/ashit/Desktop/Research Paper/Tcellex/normalized_16_samples.csv",
  row.names = 1,
  check.names = FALSE
)

# Remove QC rows
expr <- expr[!rownames(expr) %in% c(
  "N_unmapped",
  "N_multimapping",
  "N_noFeature",
  "N_ambiguous"
), ]

library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(AnnotationDbi)

gene_ids <- gsub("\\..*", "", rownames(expr))

symbols <- mapIds(
  org.Hs.eg.db,
  keys = gene_ids,
  column = "SYMBOL",
  keytype = "ENSEMBL",
  multiVals = "first"
)

expr$SYMBOL <- symbols

expr <- expr[!is.na(expr$SYMBOL), ]

expr <- expr %>%
  group_by(SYMBOL) %>%
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), mean))

expr <- as.data.frame(expr)
rownames(expr) <- expr$SYMBOL
expr$SYMBOL <- NULL

head(rownames(expr))

library(immunedeconv)

# Set method
library(immunedeconv)

result <- deconvolute(
  expr,
  method = "quantiseq"
)

write.csv(result, "immune_deconvolution_results.csv")
```

## Immune Infiltration Heatmap

```{r pressure5, echo=FALSE}
immune <- read.csv(
  "immune_deconvolution_results.csv",
  row.names = 1,
  check.names = FALSE
)

immune_mat <- as.matrix(immune)
mode(immune_mat) <- "numeric"

immune_mat[!is.finite(immune_mat)] <- 0
immune_mat <- immune_mat[complete.cases(immune_mat), ]
immune_mat <- immune_mat[apply(immune_mat, 1, var) > 0, ]

dim(immune_mat)

library(pheatmap)

library(pheatmap)

pheatmap(
  immune_mat,
  scale = "row",
  clustering_method = "ward.D2",
  fontsize = 10
)
```

## TIDE-Style Dysfunction/Exclusion Scoring

```{r pressure6, echo=FALSE}
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

expr <- read.csv(
  "C:/Users/ashit/Desktop/Research Paper/Tcellex/normalized_16_samples.csv",
  row.names = 1,
  check.names = FALSE
)

# remove QC rows
expr <- expr[!rownames(expr) %in% c(
  "N_unmapped",
  "N_multimapping",
  "N_noFeature",
  "N_ambiguous"
), ]

gene_ids <- gsub("\\..*", "", rownames(expr))

symbols <- mapIds(
  org.Hs.eg.db,
  keys = gene_ids,
  column = "SYMBOL",
  keytype = "ENSEMBL",
  multiVals = "first"
)

expr$SYMBOL <- symbols
expr <- expr[!is.na(expr$SYMBOL), ]

expr <- expr %>%
  group_by(SYMBOL) %>%
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), mean))

expr <- as.data.frame(expr)
rownames(expr) <- expr$SYMBOL
expr$SYMBOL <- NULL

# Step 2
exhaustion_genes <- c("PDCD1","CTLA4","LAG3","HAVCR2","TIGIT")

exhaustion_genes %in% rownames(expr)

#Step 3
exhaustion_mat <- expr[exhaustion_genes, , drop = FALSE]

exhaustion_score <- colMeans(exhaustion_mat, na.rm = TRUE)

# Step 4
scores <- data.frame(
  Sample = colnames(expr),
  ExhaustionScore = as.numeric(exhaustion_score)
)

#Step 5
ggplot(scores, aes(x = Sample, y = ExhaustionScore)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(title = "T-cell Exhaustion Score (TIDE-like)")

```
